tests.name: pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/javascriptCalls records direct import relations before checking imported bindings
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/javascriptCalls adds call relations for identifier bindings and reuses the function field node
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/javascriptCalls falls back to the first named child and skips call relations when nothing resolves
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/javascriptDeclarations creates a function symbol from the name field and walks the body
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/javascriptDeclarations creates a class symbol from the first named child when the name field is absent
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/javascriptDeclarations skips class declarations when the name is missing
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/javascriptDeclarations skips function declarations when the name field is present but empty
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/javascriptDeclarations skips method definitions when the name is missing
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/javascriptDeclarations creates a method symbol from the fallback child and walks its body
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/javascriptDeclarations walks the function body from the value field when a variable declarator resolves to a function symbol
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/javascriptDeclarations falls back to the last named child for both the value node and body node
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/javascriptDeclarations returns skipChildren without walking when the resolved function value has no body
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/javascriptDeclarations returns skipChildren without walking when the declarator symbol exists but no value node is present
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/javascriptDeclarations skips variable declarators that do not resolve to a function symbol
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/java finds the source root from the package path segments
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/java falls back to the nearest src directory when the package is unknown
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/java resolves a Java type path under the source root
pipeline/treesitter/javascriptCallImports returns null when the call does not contain any arguments node or string specifier
pipeline/treesitter/javascriptCallImports builds a dynamic import relation from named-children fallbacks and interpreted string nodes
pipeline/treesitter/javascriptCallImports returns null when the callee is not require
pipeline/treesitter/javascriptCallImports builds a commonjs import relation for require calls even when the path does not resolve
pipeline/treesitter/javascriptCallImports returns null without throwing when the callee fallback is missing
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/javaMethods creates method symbols and walks the method body when a Java method has a name
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/javaMethods skips unnamed Java method declarations
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/javaMethods adds Java call relations only when the invocation object resolves to an imported binding
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/java routes Java nodes to the matching handlers
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/java ignores unknown Java node types and normalizes the collected result
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/javaTypeDeclarations creates symbols for class, interface, and enum declarations while skipping unnamed nodes
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/javaTypeDeclarations prefers imported bindings when resolving superclass paths
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/javaTypeDeclarations falls back to dotted names and package names while enums skip inheritance entirely
pipeline/treesitter/javaImports records resolved Java imports when a source root is available
pipeline/treesitter/javaImports records unresolved Java imports when no source root is available
pipeline/treesitter/javaImports ignores import declarations without a readable specifier
